scripts.prepare:desktop-runtime: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$dst='.\\.desktop-runtime'; if (Test-Path $dst) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dst }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dst | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path '..\\desktop\\*.cjs' -Destination $dst -Force"
scripts.build:clean: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; taskkill /IM 'Proyecto Damas.exe' /T /F > $null 2>&1; taskkill /IM 'electron.exe' /T /F > $null 2>&1; $out=Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'ProyectoDamasBuild'; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700; if (Test-Path $out) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $out }"
scripts.build:exe: npm run build:clean && npm run build && npm run prepare:desktop-runtime && npm run build:backend && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$out=Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'ProyectoDamasBuild'; npx electron-builder --win --config.directories.output=$out"
